markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the Statement of Work (SOW) for GrowthX's AI-powered content services for Webflow, focusing on contract terms, pricing, and scope adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement on a 90-day pilot ($15k/mo) followed by a 12-month contract ($24k/mo), with adjusted page volumes](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [7-day cancellation notice added to the pilot period, maintaining flexibility for both parties](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Webflow to review and potentially approve logo usage and publicity rights](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [GrowthX highlighted their influence in recommending Webflow to clients, emphasizing mutual benefits](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

## Topics

### Contract Structure and Pilot Terms

  - [Shifted from POC to 90-day pilot + 12-month commitment structure](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Added 7-day cancellation notice within the 90-day pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Removed auto-renewal clause for the 12-month contract](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [GrowthX to update contract with separate scopes for pilot and 12-month periods](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

### Pricing and Scope Adjustments

  - [Pilot: $15,000/month for 3 months ($45,000 total)](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [12-month contract: $24,000/month ($288,000 total)](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Scope to be adjusted proportionally, with fewer pages during the pilot](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX noted this represents a 50% discount from their standard pricing](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

### Logo Usage and Publicity Rights

  - [Webflow initially resistant due to standard policy](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasized mutual benefits and past successes with other clients](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Webflow to review internally and consider allowing usage with written approval](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### GrowthX's Value Proposition

  - [Highlighted comprehensive AI framework and human strategist involvement](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Mentioned waitlist of 60+ clients and reserved spot for Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Emphasized long-term partnership approach vs. short-term POC mentality](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Webflow as Referral Source

  - [GrowthX has referred 5+ clients to Webflow, including enterprise-level customers](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Highlighted influence in recommending CMSs to clients, benefiting Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Steven to send updated contract with legal redlines within 5-10 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Bridget to add separate scopes for pilot and 12-month periods to the contract](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Webflow to internally review logo usage and publicity rights](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Teams to schedule a pre-kickoff meeting to align on expectations](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Tentative kickoff date: April 21st (pending contract finalization)](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Future communication to be conducted via email between Steven and GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/9F82WVey7N_uP2a-v9zhF-f9xK7CxeRx?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
